title: Python Medium Path
description: Moderate change (20–100 lines, possibly 2–3 files). Self-review + Sourcery (both CLI and GH App). Stops at PR — user handles CI, review, merge.

tasks.title: Context Read
tasks.description: Read relevant code, understand the problem space. Check logs, related files, existing tests.

tasks.title: TDD: Write Failing Test
tasks.description: Write a regression test (bug) or behaviour test (feature) that captures the expected change. Watch it fail first.

tasks.title: Implement
tasks.description: Write the actual code change to make the test pass. Keep it minimal and focused.

tasks.title: ruff + pytest
tasks.description: Run linter and test suite. Fix any issues.

tasks.title: Self-Review
tasks.description: Read through the entire diff. Check logic, edge cases, unchanged call sites, message correctness, test coverage.

tasks.title: Sourcery CLI
tasks.description: Run `sourcery review <files>` locally. Review findings and fix if needed.
acceptance_criteria: Sourcery CLI passes or findings addressed

tasks.title: Sourcery GH App
tasks.description: Comment @sourcery-ai review on the PR. Different ruleset from CLI — review findings separately.
acceptance_criteria: Sourcery GH App findings reviewed and addressed
